rationale: Introduce a lightweight procedural config to encourage shorter CLI invocations and payload indirection, reducing Windows command-line length risk without touching code.

edits.content:
{
  "schema": "brainflow.cli_args_policy.v1",
  "max_cmdline_chars_soft": 6000,
  "prefer_file_payload": true,
  "prefer_env_payload": true,
  "notes": "When constructing commands, avoid long inline JSON; write payloads to temp files or pass via env. This reduces Windows CLI length failures."
}

risks: Downstream components may ignore this policy if not yet implemented; no functional change unless read.
expected_benefit: Provides a clear, centralized policy for minimizing long CLI arguments, lowering risk of Windows command-line length errors when adopted.
